title: Obtuse and opaque in a quest to never repeat myself,
content:
Obtuse and opaque in a quest to never repeat myself,

but not for the audience mind you but for my own struggle with finding anything more than the deflowering lap round mountain stimulating

unless talking to family, cuz I'm acting,

"today anthony will be reading for the role of:

White, late30s, first born son x immediate Italian family and also entire friend social group, spo
inconvenient, third way through the story, submissive, generically sexual (neither a b or G) roleor well you know who's you are

Mission accomplished, however, no one thinks, "oh he's learnéd Aristotle (minus quid pro quo relations be two to twink apprentice and master bearded-older-and both put Hemlock poison on everything
context: From document: Obtuse and opaque in a quest to never repeat myself,
